'''David Wrench''' (born 3 January 1979) is an English former [[rugby league]] footballer who played for [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield]] and [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]]. Wrench started his career with [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] and was a part of the infamous 1998 academy championship side. He then made his first senior appearance for [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] in 1998 but it was not until 2001 where he broke through and made 21 appearances that season. Following this, Wrench signed For [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield]] and played 96 games for the club. He signed for Halifax originally in the 2006 season on loan from [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] but after a successful loan period his move was made permanent in Autumn 2006. Wrench can operate at both {{rlp|pr}} and {{rlp|sr}}.
